overview: Hermit Crab is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 0 physical damage, 10 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 0, MaxImpactEndurance 0. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Sight range 100.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.
